zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia Elizabeth Mure於1320年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，她的父親Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams41歲，母親Sibilla Graham22歲。她於1338年之前與John Stewart of Ralston結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1366年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia Elizabeth Mure于1320年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾时，她的父亲Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams41岁，母亲Sibilla Graham22岁。她于1338年之前与John Stewart of Ralston结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1366年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisia
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia Elizabeth Mure was born in 1320, in Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams, was 41 and her mother, Sibilla Graham, was 22. She married John Stewart of Ralston before 1338. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in 1366, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia Elizabeth Mure est née en 1320, à Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Sibilla Graham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Stewart of Ralston avant 1338. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1366, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia Elizabeth Mure 1320 in Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams 41 und ihre Mutter Sibilla Graham 22. Sie hat vor 1338 John Stewart of Ralston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1366 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Elizabeth Mure è nata il nel 1320 nel Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Sibilla Graham, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John Stewart of Ralston prima del 1338. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1366, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alicia Elizabeth Mureが1320年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdamsは41歳，母Sibilla Grahamは22歳であった。1338年以前にJohn Stewart of Ralstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1366年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで46歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia Elizabeth Mure(이)가 1320년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibilla Graham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1338년 이전 John Stewart of Ralston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1366년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia Elizabeth Mure nasceu em 1320, em Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Sibilla Graham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Stewart of Ralston antes 1338. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1366, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia Elizabeth Mure родилась в 1320 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Sibilla Graham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stewart of Ralston перед 1338 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1366 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia Elizabeth Mure nació en 1320, en Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Sibilla Graham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Stewart of Ralston antes de 1338. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió en 1366, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
